message:
style: workspace-wide rustfmt sweep across benches + core + legacy crates

Pure formatting pass, no behavior changes. Reduces ambient whitespace
diff noise so future content-only PRs can be reviewed cleanly.

The dominant shape changes rustfmt applied:

- Collapse contiguous `group.bench_with_input(` calls whose argument
  list actually fits on one line back from four-argument-per-line
  form to a single-line signature (19 bench files under
  crates/frankenterm-core/benches/: aggregator_merge, cass_search_ops,
  config_hot_path, content_dedup_ops, entropy_scheduler_bench,
  event_dedup, ewma_bench, fts_query, hyperloglog_bench,
  interval_tree_bench, lfu_cache_bench, persistent_ds_bench,
  quantile_sketch_bench, quota_cost_ops, retry_backoff,
  sizing_benchmark, storage_regression, stream_hash_bench, task_spawn,
  token_bucket_bench).

- Collapse multi-line assert_eq! / assert! calls whose message
  argument fits on one line back onto one line (config.rs,
  connector_governor.rs, crash.rs).

- Normalise `use` ordering in frankenterm/async_ossl and
  frankenterm/uds to rustfmt's canonical `{io, runtime, Cx}` order,
  separated from third-party `futures` imports.

- Collapse single-arm early-return `if/else` expressions in
  frankenterm/rangeset range_intersection() to the block form
  rustfmt prefers at that indent depth.

- Reflow frankenterm/luahelper tests' chained-method-call assertion
  to the err.to_string().contains(...) four-line form.

- Collapse frankenterm-core/src/distributed.rs sleep_with_cx(cx, Dur)
  call whose args fit on one line.

- Minor whitespace normalisation in frankenterm/window/src/os/macos
  and frankenterm/codec/tests proptest roundtrip.

Every file in this commit was verified to contain only whitespace,
argument reflow, or import-order changes - no identifiers renamed,
no control flow changed, no new types, no new constants, no new
tests. Substantive changes in this dirty working tree landed in the
preceding four commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
